title: Oil falls as tensions ease in Middle East
section_path: Oil falls as tensions ease in Middle East
section_path_text: Oil falls as tensions ease in Middle East
summary:
Main
Easing fears of supply disruptions pushed energy markets lower. Metals were mixed amid the shift in sentiment. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-06-24 131613.png | assets/2025-06-24_oil-falls-as-tensions-ease-in-middle-east_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_30b6cce1d747.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices fell amid easing fears of supply disruptions.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Easing fears of supply disruptions pushed energy markets lower. Metals were mixed amid the shift in sentiment.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices fell amid easing fears of supply disruptions. Following the US attack on its nuclear facilities, Iran launched missiles at a US base in Qatar.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: Japanese LNG imports have been subdued in recent months. However, that may be about to change with higher-than-normal temperatures expected to boost electricity demand.
